description: This file contains Balanda present continuous negative modal constructions using 'mamve'. This modality expresses present inability or impossibility in an ongoing action and corresponds to the English meaning 'cannot be ...-ing'.

rules.core_meaning: Present inability or impossibility during an ongoing action

affirmative_negative_form.note: This construction is inherently negative in meaning

question_form.structure: Subject + mamve + dho + ti-VERB + (Object/Complement) + gba + we?
question_form.function: Forms yes/no questions expressing present continuous inability

constraints: mamve must immediately follow the subject
dho must appear between the modal and the verb
ti- must be retained on the verb
No future marker (le-) may appear in this construction
No past markers (noka, nokanve, kamamve) may appear in this construction
gba must appear at the end of the clause before the question particle
No word order change occurs in questions
we? always appears at the end of the clause
This construction must not be confused with present continuous positive modality (nonve + dho + ti-VERB)

balanda: Ne mamve dho tija nza gba
english: I cannot be eating food.

balanda: Ne mamve dho tinzü ngo gba
english: I cannot be drinking water.

balanda: Ni mamve dho titeli gba
english: He cannot be sleeping.

balanda: Ne mamve dho tiyai a Wau gba
english: I cannot be going to Wau.

balanda: Ni mamve dho tidhii agbi tiyi gba
english: He cannot be coming to the house.

balanda: Wiki mamve dho tinono gbi difo gba
english: The child cannot be walking in the compound.

balanda: Ni mamve dho timande gbi njü gba
english: He cannot be working in the garden.

balanda: Danda mamve dho timoliki gba
english: We cannot be playing.

balanda: Ne mamve dho timerego ŋo gba
english: I cannot be loving you.

balanda: Ne mamve dho tiŋiyi sereso gba
english: I cannot be knowing the truth.

balanda: Ni mamve dho titerii gba
english: He cannot be thinking.

balanda: Ne mamve dho tiwe ndi gba
english: I cannot be asking them.

balanda: Ni mamve dho tivel e takoni gba
english: He cannot be telling a story.

balanda: Ne mamve dho tibaha ŋo gba
english: I cannot be seeing you.

balanda: Ni mamve dho tidhi gba
english: He cannot be hearing.

balanda: Ne mamve dho tisudi kitab gba
english: I cannot be writing a book.

balanda: Ni mamve dho tidheke kitab gba
english: He cannot be reading a book.

balanda: Ne mamve dho tisïhï kese gba
english: I cannot be buying a bike.

balanda: Ni mamve dho tisadi nza gba
english: He cannot be selling food.

balanda: Ne mamve dho tituru linguu gba
english: I cannot be pushing the fruit.

balanda: Ni mamve dho tizaka kporo gba
english: He cannot be pulling the drum.

balanda: Ni mamve dho tikara kafa gba
english: He cannot be turning the table.

balanda: Ne mamve dho tikeye ti ndi gba
english: I cannot be calling them.

balanda: Danda mamve dho tiwofo takoni gba
english: We cannot be discussing the story.

balanda: Ni mamve dho tikolo wiki gba
english: He cannot be hugging the child.

balanda: Ndi mamve dho timago gba
english: They cannot be fighting.

balanda: Ni mamve dho tivanda wiki gba
english: He cannot be protecting the child.

balanda: Ni mamve dho titeta gba
english: He cannot be falling.

balanda: Ni mamve dho tigirri gba
english: He cannot be changing.

balanda: Nguu mamve dho tivere gba
english: The tree cannot be darkening.

balanda: Maraya mamve dho tideye gba
english: The school cannot be developing.

balanda: Wiki mamve dho tirengo gba
english: The child cannot be maturing.

balanda: Ni mamve dho tisita gbi tiyi gba
english: He cannot be lying in the house.

balanda: Ne mamve dho tima nde gba
english: I cannot be doing the work.

balanda: Ne mamve dho tiwala gbi Wau gba
english: I cannot be living in Wau.

balanda: Ne mamve dho tiduru ngo gba
english: I cannot be wanting water.

balanda: Ni mamve dho tidüŋü kpendii gba
english: He cannot be remaining behind.

balanda: Ni mamve dho tibase gba
english: He cannot be singing.

balanda: Ni mamve dho tidulu gba
english: He cannot be dancing.

balanda: Ne mamve dho tiloro kananje gba
english: I cannot be watching the animals.

balanda: Ne mamve dho tija nza gba we?
english: Can I not be eating food?

balanda: Ne mamve dho tinzü ngo gba we?
english: Can I not be drinking water?

balanda: Ni mamve dho titeli gba we?
english: Can he not be sleeping?

balanda: Ne mamve dho tiyai a Wau gba we?
english: Can I not be going to Wau?

english: Can he not be coming to the house?
